stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A review Go team handles case 8471 during a malformed HTML and parser differential clinic. Build deterministic Go evidence to reconcile visible purpose, canonicals, index directives, hreflang graphs, JSON-LD, and non-claims; browser Go remains deterministic and free of native network, parser, filesystem, process, and host effects; then inject one session, secret, SSRF, output, path, log, privacy, or retention fault and contain every derivative. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Decode bounded JSON-LD as untrusted values, validate supported shapes, preserve unknowns, and state eligibility non-claims.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: json.Valid proves structured-data meaning and consumer eligibility.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Decode bounded JSON-LD as untrusted values, validate supported shapes, preserve unknowns, and state eligibility non-claims. Artifact under review: cross-signal search metadata report.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Jsonld Untrusted, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.

For separate evidence from confidence, crawl one convenient page, omit owner permission, revision, URL and robots policy, body and parser limits, record and graph provenance, frontier and goroutine ownership, Colly differences, changed fixtures, privacy, accessibility, recovery, and controlled native transfer, then accept plausible rows as Go crawler proof.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Decode bounded JSON-LD as untrusted values, validate supported shapes, preserve unknowns, and state eligibility non-claims.
